steps.action: Load 1m bars from CSV, run full upstream chain (swing→disp→fvg→mss→ob)
Load 1m bars, aggregate to 5m, run full upstream chain
Load 1m bars, aggregate to 15m, run full upstream chain
Run OB detector on all 3 TFs (1m, 5m, 15m)

Compare each detection's fields against baseline fixture: ob_bar_index, disp_bar_index, direction, ob_time, disp_time, zone_body.top/bottom, zone_wick.top/bottom, mss_direction, mss_break_type, broken_swing.type/price/bar_index, forex_day

steps.observed: All 192 detections across 3 TFs match baseline exactly

steps.action: Run OB detector on all 3 TFs
Compare each OB's retests list against baseline: total_retests count, per-retest bar_index, per-retest bars_since_ob
steps.expected: All retest data matches baseline exactly
steps.observed: All retest lists match baseline for all 192 OBs across 3 TFs

evidence.pythonCheck: Retest list comparison: total_retests, bar_index, bars_since_ob — all match for 1m/5m/15m

steps.action: Run MSS and OB detectors on all 3 TFs, compare counts
steps.expected: MSS count > OB count (some MSS events produce no OB due to fallback exhaustion)
steps.observed: 1m: MSS=179, OB=138 (41 exhaustion); 5m: MSS=44, OB=37 (7 exhaustion); 15m: MSS=20, OB=17 (3 exhaustion)

steps.action: Verify OB counts match baseline exactly
steps.expected: Exact count match confirms exhaustion cases correctly produce no OB
steps.observed: All 3 TF counts match baseline exactly: 138, 37, 17

evidence.pythonCheck: MSS-to-OB gap confirms fallback exhaustion: 41 (1m) + 7 (5m) + 3 (15m) = 51 MSS events with no valid OB anchor. Counts match baseline exactly.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 6 passed, 0 failed. All OB counts match baseline exactly (1m=138, 5m=37, 15m=17). Per-detection field matching confirmed for all 192 OBs across 3 TFs. Retest tracking fully verified. Fallback scan exhaustion confirmed via MSS-to-OB count gap. All 15 existing pytest tests pass.
